sentences.sentence: There has long been a general assumption that human beings are essentially selfish.
sentences.translation: 长期以来，人们普遍认为人类本质上是自私的。

structure.text: There has long been a general assumption
that human beings are essentially selfish

difficult_points: There has been 是现在完成时存在句，assumption 是实际主语。
that 从句说明 assumption 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: We're apparently ruthless, with strong impulses to compete against each other for resources and to accumulate power and possessions.
sentences.translation: 人们显然冷酷无情，强烈地想要彼此竞争资源，并积累权力和财产。

structure.text: We
're apparently ruthless
with strong impulses to compete against each other for resources and to accumulate power and possessions
to compete against each other for resources and to accumulate power and possessions

difficult_points: with 短语补充说明 ruthless 的具体表现。
两个 to do 并列作 impulses 的内容。

sentences.sentence: If we are kind to one another, it's usually because we have ulterior motives.
sentences.translation: 如果我们彼此友善，通常是因为我们另有动机。

structure.text: If we are kind to one another
it
's usually because we have ulterior motives

difficult_points: If 从句提出条件，主句说明友善的真正原因。
it 指代‘我们彼此友善这件事’，because 从句作原因补语。

sentences.sentence: If we are good, it's only because we have managed to control and transcend our innate selfishness and brutality.
sentences.translation: 如果我们表现得善良，也只是因为我们设法控制并超越了与生俱来的自私和残酷。

structure.text: If we are good
it
's only because we have managed to control and transcend our innate selfishness and brutality
to control and transcend our innate selfishness and brutality

difficult_points: it 指代‘我们是善良的’这一情况。
manage to do 表示设法做到，两个动词由 and 并列。

sentences.sentence: This bleak view of human nature is closely associated with the science writer Richard Dawkins, whose 1976 book The Selfish Gene became popular because it fitted so well with—and helped to justify—the competitive and individualistic ethos that was so prevalent in late 20th-century societies.
sentences.translation: 这种对人性的悲观观点与科普作家理查德·道金斯密切相关；他的著作《自私的基因》之所以流行，是因为它非常符合并帮助合理化了20世纪末社会中盛行的竞争和个人主义风气。

structure.text: This bleak view of human nature
is closely associated with the science writer Richard Dawkins
whose 1976 book The Selfish Gene became popular because it fitted so well with—and helped to justify—the competitive and individualistic ethos
that was so prevalent in late 20th-century societies

difficult_points: whose 引导非限制性定语从句，whose book 指 Dawkins 的书。
破折号中 fitted with 和 helped to justify 并列。
that 从句修饰 ethos。

sentences.sentence: Like many others, Dawkins justifies his views with reference to the field of evolutionary psychology.
sentences.translation: 和许多人一样，道金斯借助进化心理学领域来为自己的观点辩护。

structure.text: Like many others
Dawkins
justifies his views
with reference to the field of evolutionary psychology

difficult_points: Like many others 是比较状语，省略了 like many others do。
with reference to 表示依据或参照。

sentences.sentence: Evolutionary psychology theorises that present-day human traits developed in prehistoric times, during what is termed the "environment of evolutionary adaptedness".
sentences.translation: 进化心理学认为，现代人的特征形成于史前时期，即所谓的“进化适应环境”时期。

structure.text: Evolutionary psychology
theorises
that present-day human traits developed in prehistoric times
during what is termed the "environment of evolutionary adaptedness"
what is termed the "environment of evolutionary adaptedness"

difficult_points: that 从句是 theorises 的宾语，说明理论内容。
what is termed... 表示‘被称为……的时期’，what 引导名词性从句。

sentences.sentence: Prehistory is usually seen as a period of intense competition, when life was such a brutal battle that only those with traits such as selfishness, aggression and ruthlessness survived.
sentences.translation: 史前时期通常被视为激烈竞争的时代；当时生活是一场残酷的斗争，只有具备自私、攻击性和冷酷等特征的人才能生存。

structure.text: Prehistory
is usually seen as a period of intense competition
when life was such a brutal battle that only those with traits such as selfishness, aggression and ruthlessness survived
such a brutal battle that only those with traits such as selfishness, aggression and ruthlessness survived

difficult_points: when 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明这一时期。
such...that... 表示‘如此……以至于……’。

sentences.sentence: And because survival depended on access to resources—such as rivers, forests and animals—there was bound to be conflict between rival groups, which led to the development of traits such as racism and warfare.
sentences.translation: 由于生存取决于能否获得河流、森林和动物等资源，竞争群体之间必然会发生冲突，而冲突又导致了种族主义和战争等特征的发展。

structure.text: because survival depended on access to resources—such as rivers, forests and animals—
there was bound to be conflict between rival groups
which led to the development of traits such as racism and warfare

difficult_points: because 从句说明冲突产生的原因。
there was bound to be 表示某事必然发生。
which 指代前面的 conflict，而非 groups。

sentences.sentence: This seems logical.
sentences.translation: 这看起来合乎逻辑。

structure.text: This
seems
logical

difficult_points: This 指前文关于资源竞争导致冲突的推理。
seem 后接形容词作主语补足语。

sentences.sentence: But, in fact, the assumption on which this all rests—that prehistoric life was a desperate struggle for survival—is false.
sentences.translation: 但事实上，这一切所依据的假设——史前生活是一场绝望的生存斗争——是错误的。

structure.text: in fact
the assumption on which this all rests
on which this all rests
is false
that prehistoric life was a desperate struggle for survival

difficult_points: on which 引导定语从句，which 指 assumption，介词 on 表示‘依据’。
破折号中的 that 从句解释 assumption 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: It's important to remember that in the prehistoric era, the world was very sparsely populated.
sentences.translation: 重要的是要记住，史前时代的世界人口非常稀少。

structure.text: It
's important
to remember that in the prehistoric era, the world was very sparsely populated
that in the prehistoric era, the world was very sparsely populated

difficult_points: It is important to... 是形式主语结构。
that 从句作 remember 的宾语，说明需要记住的事实。

sentences.sentence: According to some estimates, around 15,000 years ago, the population of Europe was only 29,000, and the population of the whole world was less than half a million.
sentences.translation: 据一些估计，大约一万五千年前，欧洲人口只有2.9万，而全世界人口还不到50万。

structure.text: According to some estimates
around 15,000 years ago
the population of Europe was only 29,000
and the population of the whole world was less than half a million

difficult_points: 两个并列分句分别给出欧洲和全世界的人口数据。
According to some estimates 表示数字来源并非绝对精确。

sentences.sentence: Humans at that time were hunter-gatherers: people who lived by hunting wild animals and collecting wild plants.
sentences.translation: 当时的人类是狩猎采集者：靠捕猎野生动物和采集野生植物为生的人。

structure.text: Humans at that time
were hunter-gatherers
people who lived by hunting wild animals and collecting wild plants
who lived by hunting wild animals and collecting wild plants

difficult_points: 冒号后的 people 短语解释 hunter-gatherers。
by 后的 hunting 和 collecting 是并列动名词，说明谋生方式。

sentences.sentence: With such small population densities, it seems unlikely that prehistoric hunter-gatherer groups had to compete against each other for resources or had any need to develop ruthlessness and competitiveness, or to go to war.
sentences.translation: 在人口密度如此低的情况下，史前狩猎采集群体似乎不太可能必须为资源彼此竞争，也没有必要培养冷酷和竞争性，或发动战争。

structure.text: With such small population densities
it seems unlikely
that prehistoric hunter-gatherer groups had to compete against each other for resources or had any need to develop ruthlessness and competitiveness, or to go to war
to develop ruthlessness and competitiveness, or to go to war

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
had to compete 与 had any need 并列，or to go to war 继续列举不必要的行为。

sentences.sentence: There is significant evidence to back this notion from contemporary hunter-gatherer groups, who live in the same way as prehistoric humans did.
sentences.translation: 当代狩猎采集群体提供了大量证据支持这一观点，他们的生活方式与史前人类相同。

structure.text: There is significant evidence to back this notion from contemporary hunter-gatherer groups
to back this notion
who live in the same way as prehistoric humans did

difficult_points: There is... 是存在句，evidence 是实际主语。
who 修饰 contemporary hunter-gatherer groups；as 从句比较生活方式。

sentences.sentence: As the anthropologist Bruce Knauft has remarked, hunter-gatherers are characterised by "extreme political and sexual egalitarianism".
sentences.translation: 正如人类学家布鲁斯·克诺夫特所说，狩猎采集者的特点是极端的政治和性别平等。

structure.text: As the anthropologist Bruce Knauft has remarked
hunter-gatherers
are characterised by "extreme political and sexual egalitarianism"

difficult_points: As 引导来源说明从句，意为‘正如……所说’。
be characterised by 表示‘以……为特征’。

sentences.sentence: Knauft has observed that individuals in such groups don't accumulate property or possessions and have an ethical obligation to share everything.
sentences.translation: 克诺夫特观察到，这些群体中的个人不会积累财产或物品，并且在道德上有义务分享一切。

structure.text: Knauft
has observed
that individuals in such groups don't accumulate property or possessions and have an ethical obligation to share everything
to share everything

difficult_points: that 从句中 don't accumulate 和 have 并列。
to share everything 修饰 obligation，说明义务的内容。

sentences.sentence: They also have methods of preserving egalitarianism by ensuring that disparities of status don't arise.
sentences.translation: 他们还通过确保地位差异不出现的方式来维护平等主义。

structure.text: They
also have
methods of preserving egalitarianism
by ensuring that disparities of status don't arise
that disparities of status don't arise

difficult_points: by ensuring... 表示维护平等主义的方式。
that 从句作 ensuring 的宾语，disparities 是主语。

sentences.sentence: The !Kung people of southern Africa, for example, swap arrows before going hunting and when an animal is killed, the acclaim does not go to the person who fired the arrow, but to the person the arrow belongs to.
sentences.translation: 例如，非洲南部的昆人狩猎前会交换箭；动物被杀死后，荣誉不属于射出箭的人，而属于箭的主人。

structure.text: The !Kung people of southern Africa
swap arrows before going hunting
when an animal is killed
the acclaim does not go to the person who fired the arrow, but to the person the arrow belongs to
who fired the arrow
the arrow belongs to

difficult_points: when 从句说明荣誉分配发生的时间。
not...but... 对比两类人；第二个定语从句省略了关系代词。

sentences.sentence: And if a person becomes too domineering, the other members of the group ostracise them, exiling the offender from society.
sentences.translation: 如果某人变得过于专横，群体其他成员就会排斥他，把这个冒犯者逐出社会。

structure.text: if a person becomes too domineering
the other members of the group
ostracise them
exiling the offender from society

difficult_points: if 从句提出成为专横者的条件。
exiling 是现在分词结果状语，them 和 the offender 指同一人。

sentences.sentence: Typically in such groups, men do not dictate what women do.
sentences.translation: 通常在这样的群体中，男性不会规定女性该做什么。

structure.text: Typically in such groups
men
do not dictate
what women do

difficult_points: what women do 是 dictate 的宾语从句，意为女性做什么。
Typically 表示概括性的通常情况。

sentences.sentence: Women in hunter-gatherer groups worldwide often benefit from a high level of autonomy, being able to select their own marriage partners, decide what work they do and work whenever they choose to.
sentences.translation: 世界各地狩猎采集群体中的女性通常享有高度自主权，能够选择自己的婚姻伴侣、决定做什么工作，并在自己选择的时间工作。

structure.text: Women in hunter-gatherer groups worldwide
often benefit from a high level of autonomy
being able to select their own marriage partners, decide what work they do and work whenever they choose to
what work they do
whenever they choose to

difficult_points: being able to... 是分词短语，补充说明自主权的具体体现。
what work they do 和 whenever 从句分别说明工作内容和时间。

sentences.sentence: And if a marriage breaks down, they have custody rights over their children.
sentences.translation: 如果婚姻破裂，她们拥有子女的监护权。

structure.text: if a marriage breaks down
they
have custody rights over their children

difficult_points: they 指前一句的 women。
break down 用于婚姻时表示破裂。

sentences.sentence: Many anthropologists believe that societies such as the !Kung were normal until a few thousand years ago, when population growth led to the development of agriculture and a settled lifestyle.
sentences.translation: 许多人类学家认为，像昆人这样的社会直到几千年前都很常见，后来人口增长促成了农业和定居生活方式的发展。

structure.text: Many anthropologists
believe
that societies such as the !Kung were normal until a few thousand years ago
when population growth led to the development of agriculture and a settled lifestyle

difficult_points: that 从句是 believe 的宾语。
when 从句说明人口增长带来转变的时间和结果。

sentences.sentence: In view of the above, there seems little reason to assume that traits such as racism, warfare and male domination should have been selected by evolution—as they would have been of little benefit in the prehistoric era.
sentences.translation: 鉴于以上情况，几乎没有理由认为种族主义、战争和男性支配等特征会被进化选择出来——因为它们在史前时代几乎没有什么益处。

structure.text: In view of the above
there seems little reason
to assume that traits such as racism, warfare and male domination should have been selected by evolution
as they would have been of little benefit in the prehistoric era

difficult_points: there seems little reason to... 表示‘似乎没有理由……’。
should have been selected 表示对过去进化结果的推测。
as 从句说明这些特征不可能被选择的原因。

sentences.sentence: Individuals who behaved selfishly and ruthlessly would be less likely to survive, since they would have been ostracised from their groups.
sentences.translation: 自私而残酷行事的个人不太可能生存下来，因为他们会被群体排斥。

structure.text: Individuals who behaved selfishly and ruthlessly
who behaved selfishly and ruthlessly
would be less likely to survive
since they would have been ostracised from their groups

difficult_points: who 修饰 Individuals，限定这类人的行为。
would have been ostracised 是对过去情况的假设性被动。

sentences.sentence: It makes more sense, then, to see traits such as cooperation, egalitarianism, altruism and peacefulness as innate characteristics of human beings.
sentences.translation: 因此，把合作、平等、利他和和平等特征看作人类与生俱来的特点更为合理。

structure.text: It
makes more sense
to see traits such as cooperation, egalitarianism, altruism and peacefulness as innate characteristics of human beings
as innate characteristics of human beings

difficult_points: It makes sense to... 是形式主语结构。
see A as B 表示把 A 看作 B。

sentences.sentence: These were the traits that were prevalent in human life for tens of thousands of years. So presumably these traits are still strong in us now.
sentences.translation: 这些特征在人类生活中盛行了数万年。所以，这些特征想必如今在我们身上仍然很强。

structure.text: These were the traits that were prevalent in human life for tens of thousands of years
that were prevalent in human life for tens of thousands of years
So presumably these traits are still strong in us now

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 traits。
So presumably 引出基于前句的推测，still 与 now 强调延续。

sentences.sentence: But if prehistoric life wasn't really as brutal as has often been assumed, why do modern humans behave so selfishly and ruthlessly?
sentences.translation: 但如果史前生活并不像人们常常认为的那样残酷，为什么现代人会表现得如此自私和冷酷？

structure.text: if prehistoric life wasn't really as brutal as has often been assumed
as has often been assumed
why do modern humans behave so selfishly and ruthlessly

difficult_points: as...as... 比较结构中后一个 as 从句省略了主语 prehistoric life。
why 引导的疑问句倒装为 do modern humans behave。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps these negative traits should be seen as a later development, the result of environmental and psychological factors.
sentences.translation: 也许这些负面特征应被视为较晚出现的发展，是环境和心理因素造成的结果。

structure.text: these negative traits
should be seen as
a later development, the result of environmental and psychological factors
the result of environmental and psychological factors

difficult_points: should be seen as 是带情态动词的被动结构。
the result... 是对 a later development 的同位解释。

sentences.sentence: Research has shown repeatedly that when the natural habitats of primates such as apes and gorillas are disrupted, they tend to become more violent and hierarchical.
sentences.translation: 研究一再表明，当猿类和大猩猩等灵长类动物的自然栖息地遭到破坏时，它们往往会变得更加暴力和等级化。

structure.text: Research
has shown repeatedly
that when the natural habitats of primates such as apes and gorillas are disrupted, they tend to become more violent and hierarchical
when the natural habitats of primates such as apes and gorillas are disrupted
they tend to become more violent and hierarchical

difficult_points: that 从句包含 when 条件从句。
they 指 primates，not habitats；tend to 表示倾向。

sentences.sentence: So, it could well be that the same thing has happened to us.
sentences.translation: 所以，很可能同样的事情也发生在了我们身上。

structure.text: So
it
could well be
that the same thing has happened to us

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
could well be 表示‘很可能是’。

sentences.sentence: I believe that the end of the hunter-gatherer lifestyle and the advent of farming was connected to a psychological change that occurred in some groups of people.
sentences.translation: 我认为，狩猎采集生活方式的结束和农业的出现，与部分人群发生的一种心理变化有关。

structure.text: I
believe
that the end of the hunter-gatherer lifestyle and the advent of farming was connected to a psychological change
that occurred in some groups of people

difficult_points: that 从句中主语是两个并列名词，谓语 was connected 表示整体事件。
that occurred 修饰 psychological change。

sentences.sentence: There was a new sense of individuality and separateness, which led to a new selfishness, and ultimately to hierarchical societies, patriarchy and warfare.
sentences.translation: 当时出现了新的个体意识和分离感，这导致了新的自私心理，并最终形成了等级社会、父权制和战争。

structure.text: There was a new sense of individuality and separateness
which led to a new selfishness, and ultimately to hierarchical societies, patriarchy and warfare

difficult_points: There was 是存在句，a new sense 是实际主语。
which 指代这种新的意识和分离感，led to 后列出连续结果。

sentences.sentence: At any rate, these negative traits appear to have developed so recently that it doesn't seem feasible to explain them in adaptive or evolutionary terms.
sentences.translation: 无论如何，这些负面特征似乎出现得很晚，因此用适应性或进化论的术语来解释它们并不可行。

structure.text: At any rate
these negative traits
appear to have developed so recently that it doesn't seem feasible to explain them in adaptive or evolutionary terms
so recently that it doesn't seem feasible to explain them in adaptive or evolutionary terms
to explain them in adaptive or evolutionary terms

difficult_points: appear to have developed 表示对过去发展时间的推测。
so...that... 表示出现得太晚，以至于某种解释不可行。
it 是形式主语，to explain... 是真正主语。
